message:
feat(demo): add mouse interactions to Virtualized Search screen

Click list panel to select item, click search bar to focus search input,
scroll up/down to navigate list (3 items per tick). Added Cell<Rect>
area caching, handle_mouse method, keybindings, and 4 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
